stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
As part of your pre-flight calculations and given the following information for a domestic commercial flight on an aircraft with 115 seats, calculate the traffic load in accordance with the standard passenger (standard masses for male and female need to be used) and baggage masses, as defined in the annex.

Flight crew: 4 male & 3 female
Male passengers: 55
Female passengers: 44
Children: 4 sat on their own seat
Infants: 5 (2 sat with their parents / 3 on their own seat)
Baggage: 52 items
Standard mass for a flight crew member: 85 kg
Non-revenue load: 280 kg
Cargo compartments: Forward hold 1800 kg, Aft hold 1200 kg
Additional bulk cargo: 525 kg
